title: Foodstuff Quilted
description: Foodstuff adds a lot of food to the game to enhance your Minecraft experience. Foodstuff Quilted is a reimagination for foodstuff based on Quilt modloader for 1.18.2.
body:
Foodstuff Quilted


Foodstuff Quilted adds a lot of food to the game, but some recipes are hard to find, so I recommend using JEI and JER.

Crafts:


Strawberries drop from wheat (TBC)
Banana drops from jungle leaves when breaking with shears (TBC)
